summary: Clarify the inline comment to mention that num_vision_items accounts for all vision items including transfer control, not just video tokens.
Remove or update the sound-specific wording in the adjust_detail message to reflect that auto-padding is now applied.
Add a docstring for the _prepare_sound_latents method documenting sp_video_shape and sp_num_vision_items parameters.
Add a test call with sp_video_shape to exercise the SP-active padding branch and assert the padded latent_frames.
Tighten the assertion for ulysses=4 to check the exact padded sound frames value (100) instead of only a modulo condition.
